no_results.title: Nta bisubizo byabonetse bihuye n'ikibazo cyawe
no_results.subtitle: Twatanze ibisubizo bisa hano hepfo
no_results.need_help: Ukeneye ubufasha? Dufite abantu bahagaze hafi.

ai_broadened_results_alert: Twagaragaje ibisubizo byagutse kuko icyifuzo cyawe gishobora gukenera ibisobanuro birambuye. Ushobora kunoza ukoresheje ingingo cyangwa ibyifuzo.
ai_broadened_results_alert_low_info: Twagaragaje ibisubizo byagutse kuko ubushakashatsi bwawe bushobora gukenera ibisobanuro birambuye. Ushobora kunoza ukoresheje ingingo cyangwa ibyifuzo.
ai_broadened_results_alert_low_confidenc: Twagaragaje umusaruro wagutse kuko tutari twizeye uwo duhuje neza. Ushobora kunoza ukoresheje ingingo cyangwa ibitekerezo.
